name: Seasoned Long Grain & Wild Rice Mix (Uncle Be
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine all ingredients listed under the "Dry Mix" category.
2. Add water, butter, rice, and dry wild rice to the mixture. Bring to a boil.
3. Stir once or twice to combine everything thoroughly.
4. Cover the pan tightly with a lid and simmer gently for 8 to 10 minutes, or until almost all liquid has been absorbed.
5. This recipe yields 3 cups of cooked rice.
